category_sources: source_facts.description says fish-lsp is an LSP implementation for the fish shell language; official site describes IDE-level intelligence for fish scripting.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use fish-lsp; source_facts.name is fish-lsp.
docs_sources: Official fish-lsp website provides documentation/navigation for integrations and features; official GitHub README documents installation and editor usage.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official fish-lsp site list LSP features including completions, diagnostics, code actions, formatting, and editor integrations.
